hyperedges.label: Marketplace Tiering System
hyperedges.detail: Three-tier marketplace classification drives search routing and cost arbitrage strategy with EU preference

hyperedges.label: Watch Notification Pipeline
hyperedges.detail: launchd scheduler triggers runner which queries manager against DB and sends macOS notifications

hyperedges.label: Explicit-over-Implicit Design Philosophy
hyperedges.detail: Multiple design decisions share a common philosophy: prefer explicit behavior, fail loudly, avoid hidden defaults
